details.productUrlName: Stock Up JP Alternate Art Silver Scroll Foil

customAttributes.description: Look at the top five cards of your library. Put two of them into your hand and the rest on the bottom of your library in any order.
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item with an estimated shipping date of 4/24/2026. Please keep in mind card details, including rarity and card name, may change up until release date as information is updated.
customAttributes.flavorText:
